tone: Familiar and efficient, with a focus on value and convenience
hook_formula: Quick and easy lunch options, with a focus on familiar favorites and value deals
cta_style: Clear and direct, with a focus on convenience and speed
visual_direction: Simple and straightforward, with a focus on showcasing food and value offers
india_adjustment: Emphasize value and convenience, with a focus on quick and easy lunch options
dont: Avoid emphasizing alcohol or expensive options
Don't use complex or confusing language
Never prioritize luxury or fine dining
source_files: I am building a venue intelligence system for F&am.md

tone: Vibrant, energetic — a night to remember with friends
hook_formula: Kickstart your weekend with friends at the hottest bar in town. Live music, craft cocktails, and unforgettable moments.
cta_style: Join the party, book your table now!
visual_direction: Vibrant colors, lively atmosphere, photo-worthy drinks, and group-sized items
india_adjustment: Urban millennials in India prioritize experience over price, with a focus on social media-worthy moments
dont: Avoid dull or quiet ambiance visuals
Never use language that implies a low-energy night
source_files: I am building a venue intelligence system for F&am.md

tone: Sociable, lively — where friends and fun come together
hook_formula: Gather your friends and experience the ultimate social night. Shareable drinks, group-sized items, and unforgettable memories.
cta_style: Bring your friends, book now, and let's get this party started!
visual_direction: Group photos, lively atmosphere, and shareable food and drinks
india_adjustment: In India, social media influence plays a significant role in discovering new party spots and trying photo-worthy drinks
dont: Never use language that implies a low-social night
source_files: I am building a venue intelligence system for F&am.md

tone: Sophisticated, high-end experience with a focus on quality and exclusivity
hook_formula: Exclusive experience + premium offerings. Savor the finest, indulge in luxury.
cta_style: Elegant, refined, and inviting, emphasizing the unique experience
visual_direction: High-end ambiance, premium products, and exquisite plating
india_adjustment: India's growing middle class and increasing demand for premium experiences drive the growth of fine-dining and high-end bars

tone: Familiar and safe environment, focus on family-friendly atmosphere
hook_formula: Family traditions and comfort food, kids' favorites and value for money
cta_style: Soft, non-pressuring, emphasizing value and convenience for the whole family
visual_direction: Warm and inviting atmosphere, kids' menus, and family platters
india_adjustment: Family values and kid-friendliness are crucial in Indian market, with a focus on value for money
dont: Never use loud or crowded visuals
Never show alcohol as a primary focus
source_files: I am building a venue intelligence system for F&am.md

tone: Introspective, personal experience — focus on individual enjoyment

visual_direction: Cozy atmosphere, soft lighting, solo diners in a quiet corner
india_adjustment: Moderate price sensitivity, focus on per-item price and perceived value
